title: Tim Foden
text: Home * People * Tim Foden Tim Foden @ WCCC 2003 [1] Tim Foden , a British software engineer and computer chess and games programmer. He is author of the WinBoard compliant chess engine Green Light Chess [2] , and was also involved in robot auto racing simulation (RARS) [3] . More recently, he worked on the Go playing program Fluke , performing Monte-Carlo tree search [4] .
